title: 20,000 job cuts at Meta, Microsoft raise concern that AI-driven labor crisis is here
summary_full: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.
summary_public: Meta said it's cutting 10% of its workforce, just as Microsoft announced that it's offering employee buyouts for the first time in its 51-year history.
